task: Fix incorrect version reporting after 'codemie install claude <version>' by changing installVersion() return type from void to string|null, propagating the verified version through the call chain, and hardening getVersion() to prevent stale PATH fallback.

key_reasoning.reason: Five distinct components touched: AgentAdapter interface (types.ts), BaseAgentAdapter, ClaudePlugin, KimiPlugin, and the install CLI command — spanning Core/Interface, Agent-Plugin, and CLI layers. The interface contract change cascades to all agent adapter implementations, qualifying as 'touches core shared utilities'.

Primary fix path covers types.ts, BaseAgentAdapter.ts, claude.plugin.ts, kimi.plugin.ts, and install.ts (5 files). Existing test files install.version-selection.test.ts and kimi.plugin.test.ts require updates to reflect the changed return type, bringing the total to ~7 files across 4 directories (src/agents/core/, src/agents/plugins/claude/, src/agents/plugins/kimi/, src/cli/commands/).
Three distinct layers are involved: CLI (install.ts), Agent-Plugin (claude.plugin.ts, kimi.plugin.ts), and Core/Interface (types.ts, BaseAgentAdapter.ts). No DB, no external service, no UI layer.

red_flags_applied: Component Scope bumped from M (3) to L (4): touches core shared AgentAdapter interface in types.ts, which is the authoritative contract for all agent implementations.
